update: Sad news to report today. Reviewing the video footage from yesterday, it looks like we lost the baby that hatched last. Somewhere between 6:52am, Saturday July 18th, when we posted the last video, They're getting bigger, and 3:00pm that afternoon, the baby was removed from the nest. We had been noticing the last hatch wasn't getting fed as much as the 2 that hatched on the same day.
funfact: Angry birds - Robins may look adorable, but you wouldn’t want to cross one. These territorial birds will defend their patch ruthlessly. Disputes are often settled by song and body language. If that fails things quickly get physical and fights to the death can occur.
